surface_verification.justification: gitignore/scaffolder config-tooling (no web/API/UI). Runner exercises the scaffolder self-heal + the end-to-end git check-ignore on the REAL SSoT template (negation tracks triage.jsonl, .lock+.bak ignored) + template<->framework ordered-list congruence.

behaviors.behavior: canonical negation tracks jsonl, ignores lock+bak (real SSoT, end-to-end)
bare jsonl no longer a managed ignore line
